# CPU-Visible Horizon Baselines

This is the append-only result log for
`scripts/run-cpu-visible-horizon-gate.ps1`. Each entry records the exact commit,
dirty-worktree state, runtime, machine, pinned workload parameters, and raw
benchmark TSV output.

The default gate uses the AccurateM68000 interpreter, A500 PAL OCS workload
profiles, hardware specialization, 600 warmup frames, 360 measured frames, and
three repeats. `-Quick` is a wiring check only and is not a performance
baseline.

## 2026-07-21 23.26.02 +03:00

- Started: 2026-07-21 23.26.02 +03:00
- Commit: fc9d3779a71f6f76fc18a37454bdfe299cc1e14b

- Runtime: .NET 10.0.10
- .NET SDK: 10.0.301
- Warmup frames: 20
- Measured frames: 20
- Repeats: 1
